AboutMe.title: About Me
AboutMe.description: I am a passionate software developer with 5+ years of experience in building scalable web applications and microservice-based systems using modern technologies. I enjoy learning new programming languages and frameworks, and I am always looking for opportunities to improve my skills and contribute to exciting projects.
AboutMe.name: Dmytro Kotykhin

Skills.title: Skills
Skills.description: Here are some of the technologies and tools I am proficient in:

certificates.title: My Certificates
certificates.cert_2: React + NextJS 13. TypeScript, Hooks, SSR and Grid
certificates.cert_4: Node JS - basics and application architecture
certificates.cert_5: Node JS. Practical course. MongoDB, GraphQL, MySQL, Express
certificates.cert_6: Nest JS - modern backend on TypeScript and Node JS
certificates.cert_7: NestJS Microservices: Build & Deploy a Scalable Backend

education.title: My Education
education.name: National University of Radio Electronics, Kharkiv, Ukraine.

hobbies.title: My Hobbies
hobbies.hobby1: Learned programming ATmega8 and STM32 microcontrollers. I also have experience with Arduino and Raspberry Pi, which I used for various projects, including home automation and robotics.
hobbies.hobby2: Interested in radio electronics and have built several amateur radio projects.
hobbies.hobby3: In my free time, I enjoy riding my bike. I also have a passion for photography and love capturing moments from my travels around the world.
